recommendations.title: Fatherhood
recommendations.overview: A widowed new dad copes with doubts, fears, heartache and dirty diapers as he sets out to raise his daughter on his own. Inspired by a true story.

recommendations.title: Moving On
recommendations.overview: Two old friends reconnect at their friend's funeral, and decide to exact revenge on the widower who wronged all three of them decades earlier.

recommendations.title: Cirque du Freak: The Vampire's Assistant
recommendations.overview: When Darren Shan is taken to a circus that's chock-full of sideshow oddities, he meets a vampire and receives a life-changing bite on the neck.

recommendations.title: Grandma
recommendations.overview: Self-described misanthrope Elle Reid has her protective bubble burst when her 18-year-old granddaughter, Sage, shows up needing help. The two of them go on a day-long journey that causes Elle to come to terms with her past and Sage to confront her fu

recommendations.title: American Pie

recommendations.title: Bel Canto
recommendations.overview: A famous opera singer is held hostage in South America by a guerrilla rebel group after performing at a Japanese businessman's lavish birthday party. Unexpected bonds are forged in the standoff that ensues.

recommendations.title: Admission

recommendations.title: A Bronx Tale

recommendations.title: In Good Company

recommendations.title: American Dreamz
